title: MineRaft
description: Vanilla recreation of the hit game "Raft"
body:
**Transforms your survival Minecraft experience into a recreation of the hit game 'Raft'** This datapack comes with an overhauled experience, with new mechanics, new blocks, structures, and even new mobs! **Since this is a Datapack and Resource pack, both can be installed once server side and will apply to all players that join, voiding the need for each player to install the pack!** > ### Building > - *Decorate to your hearts content!* > > - You can place various large structures such as foundations, smelteries, collection nets and more with a grid-like building style! > > - You can tear down structures with your builders hammer! > ### Flotsam > - *Scoop up various types of junk to craft with!* > > - Flotsam spawns around the raft and can be fished up with a fishing rod > ### Steve the Shark > - *Chomp Chomp* > > - Steve is a friendly lil' fellow! > > - He circles your raft and occasionly scoots in to take a snack off it #### Q. How do I download the pack? > #### A. Install the datapack in the vanilla world creation menu! ¹ #### Q. I cant find the resource pack! > #### A. Go to the Versions tab, find the **datapack** version you want and click the name, then scroll to the bottom and install the resource pack. ² #### Q. When is * feature going to be added / When is it going to be updated to * version?? > #### A. Join the Discord for update discussion :D #### Q. I experienced a bug, what do I do? > #### A. Join the Discord and file a bug report, or make an issue on the github! :D
¹ How To Download! Data Pack: 1. Click the latest Datapack version. 2. Scroll down and Download the Primary file. 3. If you want to create a World, go to Singleplayer > Create New World > Data Packs > Open Pack Folder. (It is not recommended to put it in an already existing world!) 4. Copy/Cut and Paste the downloaded file there. 5. Open/Create your world. 6. Note: You need to also install the Required Resource Pack. Required Resource Pack: 1. Click the Datapack featured version. 2. Scroll down and Download the Required Resource Pack. 3. Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. 4. Copy/Cut and Paste the downloaded file there. 5. Activate the Resource Pack. (you can reload the resources with f3+t ingame) ## See image below for reference ![Image for reference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfa9150deed9ee84ced125388f9aca2249c1ee71.png)
² How to get Resource Pack! ![How To Download (Click versions tab, click version, scroll to bottom, click download)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8788d805b2426f5fe0de6a1b465a46645c811be.gif)
* Release Dates #### There is no SET date for update releases, though we can confirm that the 1.0.0 update is in the works, you can join the discord for more info!
